title: The 84-Day Arc in MONEY v2: What It Does and What It Doesn't
subtitle: A reading on the structure of the 84-day money program and how the three phases fit together
excerpt: An overview of the 84-day arc in the MONEY v2 program, the three phases, what each one targets, how they build on each other, and what you're doing with the work in this library if you're using it alongside the full program.
sourceNotes: Written for homemade.education as an orientation to the MONEY v2 program structure.

content.text: The 84-day arc in the MONEY v2 program covers twelve weeks of structured money work. It's not twelve weeks of doing the same thing on repeat. It's a sequence: each phase builds on the one before it, and the things you do in Week 1 won't land the same way if you skip to Week 8 first.
Phase 1, Weeks 1 to 3: Foundation and daily panic

The first phase addresses the acute layer: the daily anxiety, the compulsive account-checking, the physical sensation of money dread. Practices in this phase are fast and functional. Tapping scripts for daily panic. Energy statements for steady ground. Short journal sets for locating where the anxiety sits in the body. The goal is to stabilise the nervous system enough to do the deeper work.
Phase 2, Weeks 4 to 8: Identity and belief

The middle phase goes to the layer beneath daily anxiety: the identity patterns, the inherited beliefs, the stories about what someone like you is allowed to earn and keep. This is the longest phase and the most targeted. It covers the earning ceiling, the worthy receiver question, the wealth-and-family tension, the specific stuck points that show up in different areas of financial life. You need some stability from Phase 1 before this layer is workable.
Phase 3, Weeks 9 to 12: Overflow and anchoring

The final phase moves from clearing resistance to installing the new state as permanent. Practices here are expansive: overflow work, abundance identity, circulation and generosity. The closing ceremony anchors the shift at the end of the arc. This phase lands differently when the earlier work has been done. Done first, without the foundation and identity layers, it tends to feel like performance.

The entries in this library correspond to specific points in the 84-day arc, plus additional entries for stuck points not in the arc itself: pricing, inheritance, other women's success, investment avoidance. You can use the library entries alongside the full program, or standalone if you're not running the full program. Both work.
Written for homemade.education. It introduces the shape of the MONEY v2 program.
